'''鈭歮-m-w-zh''' ('''kamamwezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cakewalk|cakewalk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-m-w-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cakewalk|cakewalk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-m-w-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kamamwezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimamwezhoko|thimamwezhoko]] || [[word:jimamwezhoko|jimamwezhoko]] || [[word:shimamwezhoko|shimamwezhoko]] || [[word:kimamwezhoko|kimamwezhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumamwezhoko|thuthumamwezhoko]] || [[word:jujumamwezhoko|jujumamwezhoko]] || [[word:shushumamwezhoko|shushumamwezhoko]] || [[word:kukumamwezhoko|kukumamwezhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomamwezhoko|thomamwezhoko]] || [[word:jomamwezhoko|jomamwezhoko]] || [[word:shomamwezhoko|shomamwezhoko]] || [[word:komamwezhoko|komamwezhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomamwezhoko|thomamwezhoko]] || [[word:jomamwezhoko|jomamwezhoko]] || [[word:shomamwezhoko|shomamwezhoko]] || [[word:komamwezhoko|komamwezhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
